data.summary: [Triple Drop Campaign Preview] The amount of rewards dropped in Missions (Normal) will be tripled. 🗓
data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions (Normal) will be tripled.

🗓️Period: 8/5 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 8/19 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
※You can obtain 6 pieces of T9 Equipment Blueprints in Area 25 after the maintenance on 8/6(Tue).
